<!-- Thanks for contributing to Joust Engine! Keep PRs focused. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #N" (full fix) or "Addresses #N (item X)" (partial). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security / hardening
- [ ] Test / CI / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Paste the result of: -->

- [ ] `npm run ci` is green locally (`npm run check` + `npm test`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass on Linux and macOS (CI)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed
- [ ] No secrets committed; no candidate→model unblinding info in any public text
- [ ] Change is focused and scoped to the linked issue
